name: IntegerConverter
summary: The IntegerConverter class converts types to and from the integer datatype.

constructors.name: IntegerConverter
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the IntegerConverter class

methods.name: CanConvertFrom
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the source type to the integer datatype.

methods.name: CanConvertTo
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the integer datatype to the destination type.

methods.name: ConvertFrom
methods.summary: Converts an object from the given culture to the Tekla.Structures.Datatype.Integer type.

methods.name: ConvertTo
methods.summary: Converts an object from the the integer datatype to the given destination type.
